name: Carne Asada w/ Cilantro Sauce & Warm Manchego Cheese
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique brand Manchego, cut into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill the steaks to desired doneness.
2. To make the sauce, heat the oil in a pan. Add the onion, garlic, and cilantro, and cook until softened.
3. Stir in the lime juice and Crema Mexicana. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Purée the mixture in the blender, adding salt and pepper to taste.
5. Top each steak with a slice of Manchego cheese so it melts.
6. Serve the steaks topped with the warm cilantro sauce.
